identity.name: E1
identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

usage_rules: Headings (h1-h3): Manrope. Bold (700) or ExtraBold (800). Tracking-tight.
Body: Inter. Regular (400) or Medium (500). Leading-relaxed.
Data/IDs: JetBrains Mono. Text-xs or Text-sm.
CRITICAL: Do not use Inter for Headings.

colors.strategy: Professional Blue with an Electric Twist
rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use Deep Navy (hsl 222 47% 11%).
Alert/Error Color: Use a sharp Coral/Orange instead of standard Red for warnings to maintain the 'Blue/Orange' complementary contrast.

spacing_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. 2-3x more than typical SaaS.

cards.classes: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: rounded-md font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 hover:shadow-primary/40 transition-all
buttons.secondary: rounded-md border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

inputs.classes: h-10 rounded-md border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-slate-950/70 border-b border-white/20 dark:border-white/10
visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle radial gradients for backgrounds, not linear. Example: 'bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-blue-900/20 via-background to-background'

login_background.usage: Full screen background for login/register pages with overlay

assets.icons: Use Lucide React (default). For specialized property icons, use Phosphor Icons if needed.

implementation_instructions.step_1: Update /app/frontend/src/index.css with the provided CSS variables for Light and Dark modes.
implementation_instructions.step_2: Install 'Manrope' and 'JetBrains Mono' fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS import.
implementation_instructions.step_3: Configure tailwind.config.js to extend font families: sans: ['Manrope', ...], body: ['Inter', ...], mono: ['JetBrains Mono', ...].
implementation_instructions.step_4: Create a 'Layout' component that enforces the 'Control Room' grid structure.
implementation_instructions.step_5: Apply the 'Glass-Tech' card style to all dashboard widgets.
implementation_instructions.step_6: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic centered layouts.
Dark Mode First: Design for dark mode as the primary 'Control Room' experience, then adapt for light mode.
Micro-Interactions: Add hover:scale-[1.02] to cards and active:scale-[0.98] to buttons.
Data Density: Use dense tables for 'Admin' views, but spacious cards for 'Tenant' views.
